resetDataSubtitle: Choose what you want to delete.
resetConfirm: Do you really want to delete all local data (stats, sessions, dictionary)?
introText: Pick a mode in the menu. Questions are shuffled. The position of the correct answer stays the same (1–4).
homeWhatYouGetText: Languages (DE/EN/PT), word context menu (definition/examples or add to dictionary), personal stats (right/wrong/skipped) and multiple learning modes.
homeModeMemText: Shows only the correct answer (position stays the same).
homeModeTrainText: Instant feedback (green/red) and repetitions: harder questions come back more often.
homeModeTestText: 33 questions (30 Germany + 3 state), 60 minutes, result only at the end.
homeModeReviewText: Shows questions you most often get wrong or skip.
tipMemorizationText: You only see the correct answer. Other positions show “------” so you can memorize the answer position.
tipTrainingText: Tap an option to get instant feedback. In this session, questions you miss often come back more frequently.
tipTestText: 33 questions in 60 minutes. Result only at the end. Unanswered questions count as skipped.
tipReviewText: See your hardest questions (wrong and skipped) and practice them again.
testRulesText: During the test, you will receive 33 questions. You have 60 minutes to answer them. For each question, you must choose the correct answer from four possible answers. If you answer at least 17 questions correctly, you will pass the test.
testComposition: Composition: 30 general questions (Germany) + 3 questions from your state.
question: Question
finishTestConfirm: Do you really want to finish the test? You will then see the result.
noStatsYet: No stats yet. Answer a few questions in Training or Test.
emptyDictionary: No saved words yet. Click a word in any question/answer.
